title: VayuPack - Immersion
description: My latest texture pack that changes the GUI and HUD + a rework of the [VayuPack - BlackUI] texture pack with modifications.
body:
![Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec0e256015042d12aaaeace17e7f160bfbf566a.png)
---
Immerse yourself in the world of **VayuPack - Immersion**, a texture pack that redefines the visual experience. Designed to be more pleasant to the eye, this pack changes the HUD and GUI for a cleaner, more modern look. Flowers are now in 3D, adding a realistic touch to nature, while armors have been redesigned to resemble actual gear. Some blocks have been subtly adjusted, with more vibrant colors, making the world of Minecraft feel livelier and more dynamic. Whether you play in Survival, Creative, or Hardcore mode, **VayuPack - Immersion** is optimized for all versions, ensuring complete immersion and smooth gameplay. Experience Minecraft in a new way with a refined and enhanced visual

---
